TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Rou ka ni-mou-hylli ki Jeru-salem ta neni, ni-iroua ki Bethsage, tou voukkyn ka makka vavoua ki ymmagh, anna ta nipa-dadingi-en ti Jesus ta rarouha ki Pahtatautauug-han tyn, ka ni k'ma neini-æn,
Rou ka ni-mou-hylli ki Jerusalem ta neni, ni-iroua ki Bethsage, tou voukkyn ka makka vavoua ki ymmagh, anna ta nipa-dadingi-en ti Jesus ta rarouha ki Pahtatautauug-han tyn, ka ni k'ma neini-æn,
S.TRANSL: Ende als sy nu Jerulalem genaeckten ende gekomen waren tot Bethphage aen den olijfbergh doe sand Jesus twee Dilciptlen seggende tot hae?
And when they drew nigh unto Jerusalem, and were come to Bethphage, unto the mount of Olives, then sent Jesus two disciples,
耶穌和門徒將近耶路撒冷，到了伯法其，在橄欖山那裏。

S.FORM: Ou-koua-au ta Euma k'an na ka matti-doumma ymoumi-æn, rå paki-dys-ei-moumi maki-valei ta louang ka haäva ka yppou ka na kakirihg, ka akou-lam ki patak: æ'éu-kakirihg-ei mad jau-an,
Ou-koua-au ta Euma k'an na ka matti-doumma ymoumi-æn, rå paki-dys-ei-moumi maki-valei ta louang ka haäva ka yppou ka na kakirihg, ka akou-lam ki patak: æ'éu-kakirihg-ei mad jau-an,
S.TRANSL: Gaet henen in het bleck dat teghen u ober [leght,Jende ghy sult cerstont een erelinne ghebonden binden ende een beulen met hae: : ontbintle ende brengtse tot my.
Saying unto them, Go into the village over against you, and straightway ye shall find an ass tied, and a colt with her: loose them, and bring them unto me.
耶穌就打發兩個門徒，對他們說：「你們往對面村子裏去，必看見一匹驢拴在那裏，還有驢駒同在一處；你們解開，牽到我這裏來。

S.FORM: Nda jrou ka akou-sou ta ti-mamang ymoumi-æn, k'maah-ka-mou-hynna-ra, mæiææpa ki anna ta Meirang: ka patou-dys-eih tyn madingi ta anna.
Nda jrou ka akou-sou ta ti-mamang ymoumi-æn, k'maah-ka-mou-hynna-ra, mæiææpa ki anna ta Meirang: ka patou-dys-eih tyn madingi ta anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende indien u yemandt pet segt soo sult ghy segghen dat de Heere deser ban noode heeft : ende hp salse terstondt senden.
And if any man say ought unto you, ye shall say, The Lord hath need of them; and straightway he will send them.
若有人對你們說甚麼，你們就說：『主要用牠。』那人必立時讓你們牽來。

S.FORM: Ni-pa-ymdden pastæu ta mamang katta, alei ka pavæut-auh ta na sou ki Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka k'ma,
Ni-pa-ymdden pastæu ta mamang katta, alei ka pavæut-auh ta na sou ki Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka k'ma,
S.TRANSL: Ditalles nu is geschiet op dat berbult worde het gene ghesproken is door den Propheet seggende
All this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken by the prophet, saying,
這事成就是要應驗先知的話，說：

S.FORM: Vana-vann'ei ta Tatatimi-en ki Sion: k'ytt'ei, irarouroua ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau mou-koua ymhou-an, mah-ahpugh ki rýh, ka pa-haäva'n ki louang ka yp-pou, ki patak ki yppo ka akou paddan.
Vana-vann'ei ta Tatatimi-en ki Sion: k'ytt'ei, irarouroua ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau mou-koua ymhou-an, mah-ahpugh ki rýh, ka pa-haäva'n ki louang ka yp-pou, ki patak ki yppo ka akou paddan.
S.TRANSL: Segget de dochter Sion : siet uwe Koningh komt [tot] u sachtmoedigh ende gheseten op cen erelinne ende een een beulen zijnde een jongh: rentr jock-dragende [erelin-
Tell ye the daughter of Sion, Behold, thy King cometh unto thee, meek, and sitting upon an ass, and a colt the foal of an ass.
要對錫安的居民說：

S.FORM: Irou ka d'marang ta Pahta tæutau-han-da, ni-pâmt-en nein mama ki na si-kakidi ti Jesus nei nian,
Irou ka d'marang ta Pahta tæutau-han-da, ni-pâmt-en nein mama ki na si-kakidi ti Jesus nei nian,
S.TRANSL: Ende de Discipelen henen gegaen zijnde ende gedaen hebbende geliick Jesus harr bebolen hadde … -
And the disciples went, and did as Jesus commanded them,
門徒就照耶穌所吩咐的去行，

S.FORM: Ni-add-nein ta louang ka yppou lam ki patak tyn,ka ni-atta-habyl-len ki anna ta koulamough nein, ka ni-pa-ialalei nein tyni-æn ki anna.
Ni-add-nein ta louang ka yppou lam ki patak tyn,ka ni-atta-habyl-len ki anna ta koulamough nein, ka ni-pa-ialalei nein tyni-æn ki anna.
S.TRANSL: Brachten de. erelume ende her beulen ende lepdenHare" kleederen op deselbe endesetteden [bem] daer op.
And brought the ass, and the colt, and put on them their clothes, and they set him thereon.
牽了驢和驢駒來，把自己的衣服搭在上面，耶穌就騎上。

S.FORM: Ka ouhang ki batoung ta makoilalaulau ni-mæpagh ki kou-lamough nein tou darang, ka ra-rounia ta nithmahta ki pehil ki pærænnah, ka ni-havoulou-en néin ta anna tou darang.
Ka ouhang ki batoung ta makoilalaulau ni-mæpagh ki koulamough nein tou darang, ka ra-rounia ta nithmahta ki pehil ki pærænnah, ka ni-havoulou-en néin ta anna tou darang.
S.TRANSL: Ende de weelte schare Sspreyden Hare kleederen op den wegh ende andere hieuwen tacken ban de boomen ende sprepden'se op den.
And a very great multitude spread their garments in the way; others cut down branches from the trees, and strawed them in the way.
眾人多半把衣服鋪在路上；還有人砍下樹枝來鋪在路上。

S.FORM: Ka makoilalaulau kanna ka siourou-ourou ka si-äæuäugh ta ni-mako-langah, kommakoua, Hosanna ki Alak ti David: pakou-riang-auh loumoulugh ta irarou-roua tou Nanang ti JEHOVA: Hosanna tou sih-tounnoun si-ba-vau ki vullu-vullum.

Ka makoilalaulau kanna ka siourou-ourou ka si-äæuäugh ta ni-mako-langah, kommakoua, Hosanna ki Alak ti David: pakou-riang-auh loumoulugh ta irarou-roua tou Nanang ti JEHOVA: Hosanna tou sih-tounnoun si-bavau ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Ende de scharen die boor-ginghenende die bolgden riepen seggende hofanna den sone Dabids : geregent[ic ]hp die komt inden Name des Heeren: Hosanna in dehooghlte Hemelen,
And the multitudes that went before, and that followed, cried, saying, Hosanna to the son of David: Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord; Hosanna in the highest.
前行後隨的眾人喊着說：

S.FORM: Irou ka sararbo ta teni tou Jerusalem, ni-rmoumang ta sat kæ æunia an, ka ui-kina, Timang ta ti atta?
Irou ka sararbo ta teni tou Jerusalem, ni-rmoumang ta sat kæ æunia an, ka ui-kina, Timang ta ti atta?
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy te Jernfalem in quam wiert de geheele stadt beroert seggende Wie 1s dese +
And when he was come into Jerusalem, all the city was moved, saying, Who is this?
耶穌既進了耶路撒冷，合城都驚動了，說：「這是誰？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta makoilalau-lau Ti atta ta ti Jesus, ka Tama-mattæ'i-tan ka-makka Nazareth ka tou Galilæä.
Ka ni-k'ma ta makoilalaulau Ti atta ta ti Jesus, ka Tama-mattæ'i-tan ka-makka Nazareth ka tou Galilæä.
S.TRANSL: Ende de scharen leyden Dele is Jesus de Prophece ban Narartth in Gali-
And the multitude said, This is Jesus the prophet of Nazareth of Galilee.

S.FORM: Kani-mou-kouva tou Kou-va ki tatamd-en ki Alid ta ti Jesus, ka ni-â-ymmid tyn matountoun ta papeila ki peila-appa tou Kouva ki tatamd-den, ka ni-papa autou kagh-en tyn ta tpal ki tama-maviri ki malyttouk, ki taoul appa ki ta ma-papeilla ki padugh.

Kani-mou-kouva tou Kou-va ki tatamd-en ki Alid ta ti Jesus, ka ni-â-ymmid tyn matountoun ta papeila ki peila-appa tou Kouva ki tatamd-den, ka ni-papa autou kagh-en tyn ta tpal ki tama-maviri ki malyttouk, ki taoul appa ki ta ma-papeilla ki padugh.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus ging in den den Tempel Godts ende dreef uyt alle die betkochten ende kochten in den Tempel endekeejde om de tafelen der wisselabrs mbe de fit-fioelen der gene die de duyben yokochie. _
And Jesus went into the temple of God, and cast out all them that sold and bought in the temple, and overthrew the tables of the moneychangers, and the seats of them that sold doves,
耶穌進了上帝的殿，趕出殿裏一切做買賣的人，推倒兌換銀錢之人的桌子，和賣鴿子之人的凳子，

S.FORM: Ka nik ma tà teni neini-æn, Ni-soulat-en-ato: Tallagh au ta pananang-eih tallagh ki pa-ko-Alilid-en, rå ni-pei-ringei-ou-mi ta atta ki varyng'ha ki tama-Ipogh.
Ka nik ma tà teni neini-æn, Ni-soulat-en-ato: Tallagh au ta pananang-eih tallagh ki pa-ko-Alilid-en, rå ni-pei-ringei-ou-mi ta atta ki varyng'ha ki tama-Ipogh.
S.TRANSL: & hy leyde tot harr Dae? is ghelch:eben : Mn Huys sal een hups des gebedts genaemt worde maer gy hebt dat tot eenen mgor.denatrs kupl gemaeckt
And said unto them, It is written, My house shall be called the house of prayer; but ye have made it a den of thieves.
對他們說：「經上記着說：

S.FORM: . Ka ni-ierroua tyni-æn mou kouva tou Kouvá ki tatamd-den ta mayoutta ki mapilei-appa, ka ni-padarikaghtyn neini-æn,
. Ka ni-ierroua tyni-æn mou kouva tou Kouvá ki tatamd-den ta mayoutta ki mapilei-appa, ka ni-padarikaghtyn neini-æn,
S.TRANSL: Ende daer quianien biinde ende kjeupele tot hem in den Tempel ende Hy genas deselbe.
And the blind and the lame came to him in the temple; and he healed them.
在殿裏有瞎子、瘸子到耶穌跟前，他就治好了他們。

S.FORM: Nda irou ka kmytta ta Tama-phik ka Si-baváu ki mahko sasonlat-appa kini-pa-ouryng-hau ka na ryng-ei tyn, ki sarauwei appa ka mako-langah tmatæäm tou Kouva tatamd-den," kā k'ma, Hosanna ki Alak ti David, ouhang tna-ghpang-ato.

Nda irou ka kmytta ta Tama-phik ka Si-baváu ki mahko sasonlat-appa kini-pa-ouryng-hau ka na ryng-ei tyn, ki sarauwei appa ka mako-langah tmatæäm tou Kouva tatamd-den," kā k'ma, Hosanna ki Alak ti David, ouhang tna-ghpang-ato.
S.TRANSL: Als nu de Obeypriesters ende Schiitt gheleerde fagen de wonderheden die hy dede ende be kinderen roepende iden Temptt mde seggheribe Hosanna den font Dabids namen p dat feer gualick t e
And when the chief priests and scribes saw the wonderful things that he did, and the children crying in the temple, and saying, Hosanna to the son of David; they were sore displeased,
祭司長和文士看見耶穌所行的奇事，又見小孩子在殿裏喊着說：「和散那歸於大衛的子孫！」就甚惱怒，

S.FORM: Ka ni-kma tyni-æn, 'Illing-'nouhou kaua maghk ma sou ta neni? Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Hahei-rå. Asli-moumi lava ni-yhkakouan kuhtung, Tou mou tous ki vahau ká rau-ei ki mauho appa ni-sitanang-ohou ta louloug-han?

Ka ni-kma tyni-æn, 'Illing-'nouhou kaua maghk ma sou ta neni? Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Hahei-rå. Asli-moumi lava ni-yhkakouan kuhtung, Tou mou tous ki vahau ká rau-ei ki mauho appa ni-sitanang-ohou ta louloug-han?
S.TRANSL: estyden tot Hoort ghy [ wel, ] war deseseggen Ende Jesus leyde tot haer Jae. Hebt ghy noyt gelesen Wyt den mondt Der jonge kinderen ende der soogelinghen hebt ghy [4] lof torbreteydt s
And said unto him, Hearest thou what these say? And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?
對他說：「這些人所說的，你聽見了嗎？」耶穌說：「是的。經上說『你從嬰孩和吃奶的口中完全了讚美』的話，你們沒有念過嗎？」

S.FORM: Ka rou pa-itou-kakoua nei-ni-een, ni-d'marang teu æuma moukoua tou Bethania, ka ni-mi-oulei-hynna-rà.
Ka rou pa-itou-kakoua nei-ni-een, ni-d'marang teu æuma moukoua tou Bethania, ka ni-mi-oulei-hynna-rà.
S.TRANSL: Endehae? berfarende gingh hy ban daer uy de rem stadt nae Bethania ende obernachtte aldaer.
And he left them, and went out of the city into Bethany; and he lodged there.
於是離開他們，出城到伯大尼去，在那裏住宿。 （可11‧12－14，20－24）

S.FORM: Ka madama-appa dou sa likogh mau-'uma, ni-mahgangei ta teni.
Ka madama-appa dou sa likogh mau-'uma, ni-mahgangei ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Endedes morgens broegh als hy weder keerde nae de Dadt hongerde hem.
Now in the morning as he returned into the city, he hungered.
早晨回城的時候，他餓了，

S.FORM: Nda irou ka k'ytt'an tyn ta sat ka ngara-an ka lakauongin tou said ki darang, ni mou-koua ta teni hynna, ka assi ni-k'abalei tyn tou [ngara] k'anna dyk ka hapa. Ka ni-k ma ki anna, Myh-ka koua-ah kow assi makka-voua tou ydda-rynnoug-han. Ka ni-madys milak-lak ta lakuoungin.

Nda irou ka k'ytt'an tyn ta sat ka ngara-an ka lakauongin tou said ki darang, ni mou-koua ta teni hynna, ka assi ni-k'abalei tyn tou [ngara] k'anna dyk ka hapa. Ka ni-k ma ki anna, Myh-ka koua-ah kow assi makka-voua tou ydda-rynnoug-han. Ka ni-madys milak-lak ta lakuoungin.
S.TRANSL: Ende siende eenen bygeboom aen den wegh ging nae hem toe. ende bandt niet aen den selben dan alleenlick bladeren. Ende seyde ge Upt u on worde geen beucht mee? index ceuEnde'de bygeboom berdordeterftont. .

And when he saw a fig tree in the way, he came to it, and found nothing thereon, but leaves only, and said unto it, Let no fruit grow on thee henceforward for ever. And presently the fig tree withered away.
看見路旁有一棵無花果樹，就走到跟前，在樹上找不着甚麼，不過有葉子，就對樹說：「從今以後，你永不結果子。」那無花果樹就立刻枯乾了。

S.FORM: Irou ka k'ytt'an [ta anna] ki Pahtatæutauug-ban ni-mou kiap-ato-ra, ka ni-koun nein, Ni-smom-ato mamei-mang milaklak ta lakæuoungin?
Irou ka k'ytt'an [ta anna] ki Pahtatæutauug-ban ni-mou kiap-ato-ra, ka ni-koun nein, Ni-smom-ato mamei-mang milaklak ta lakæuoungin?
S.TRANSL: Ende de Discipelen [dat] siende bepworderden haer segghende hoe is de hydheboom [soo] terftont berborret ;
And when the disciples saw it, they marvelled, saying, How soon is the fig tree withered away!
門徒看見了，便希奇說：「無花果樹怎麼立刻枯乾了呢？」

S.FORM: Râ ni-mattæi-v'lli ta ti Je. sus k'ma neini-æn, Missing koun nau-kamou-râ, Irou akou-mea-kamou ki tnamsing-an da tou assi pæg-dælag-in ki ryh, ynna-ka-mou assi dyk pâm't-ah ka ni-paa-mut ki lakauoung-in, nda heirou pa-sousou-ei-moumi ki voukkyn katta, Pllei-auh ka aryng-an-ei tou vaoung, paamt-aul-ato k'an-na.

Râ ni-mattæi-v'lli ta ti Je. sus k'ma neini-æn, Missing koun nau-kamou-râ, Irou akou-mea-kamou ki tnamsing-an da tou assi pæg-dælag-in ki ryh, ynna-kamou assi dyk pâm't-ah ka ni-paa-mut ki lakauoung-in, nda heirou pa-sousou-ei-moumi ki voukkyn katta, Pllei-auh ka aryng-an-ei tou vaoung, paamt-aul-ato k'an-na.
S.TRANSL: Doch Jesus antwoordende leyde tot Haer Doorwaer segghe ick u Indien ghy geloobe hadder efi niet en twysffeldet ghy foudc niet alleenlick doen t ghene den bygeboom [is gefchiedt] mae? indien ghy oock tot besen bergh seydet Wordt opgeheben ende indie zee gheworpen het soude geschiede.

Jesus answered and said unto them, Verily I say unto you, If ye have faith, and doubt not, ye shall not only do this which is done to the fig tree, but also if ye shall say unto this mountain, Be thou removed, and be thou cast into the sea; it shall be done.
耶穌回答說：「我實在告訴你們，你們若有信心，不疑惑，不但能行無花果樹上所行的事，就是對這座山說：『你挪開此地，投在海裏！』也必成就。

S.FORM: Nda ymmid ki mamang ka toumimiau-moumi tou pako Alilid-en, rou tna-msing-kamou, ara-au-mouni ta anna.
Nda ymmid ki mamang ka toumimiau-moumi tou pako Alilid-en, rou tna-msing-kamou, ara-au-mouni ta anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende al wat ghy sult begeeren in het ghebelt geloobende sult ghy ontfangen.
And all things, whatsoever ye shall ask in prayer, believing, ye shall receive.
你們禱告，無論求甚麼，只要信，就必得着。」 （可11‧27－33；路20‧1－8）

S.FORM: Nda dou ou-kouva-en tyn ki Kouva ki tadamd-den ki Alid, ni-ierroua tyni-æn, dou mapoun mahtæutauugh ki Tama-phik Ka Si-bavau lam ki mamoumou ká meireirang ki ta'u, ka k'ma, Tou keirang-en ti mang ta paamt-ten-hou ta atta? Ka timang ta ni-pi ä ymhou-an ki keirang-en k'anna ki kidi?

Nda dou ou-kouva-en tyn ki Kouva ki tadamd-den ki Alid, ni-ierroua tyni-æn, dou mapoun mahtæutauugh ki Tama-phik Ka Si-bavau lam ki mamoumou ká meireirang ki ta'u, ka k'ma, Tou keirang-en ti mang ta paamt-ten-hou ta atta? Ka timang ta ni-pi ä ymhou-an ki keirang-en k'anna ki kidi?
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy in den Tempel ghekomen was quamen tot hem terwijle hy lecrde de Obeypiielters ende de Ouderlingen des bolcks seggende Door wat macht doet ghp dese dingen + Ende wie heeft u dese macht gege-

And when he was come into the temple, the chief priests and the elders of the people came unto him as he was teaching, and said, By what authority doest thou these things? and who gave thee this authority?
耶穌進了殿，正教訓人的時候，祭司長和民間的長老來問他說：「你仗着甚麼權柄做這些事？給你這權柄的是誰呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-matte-vlli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Talig-au-ppa-mau-kamou ki sasat ki sou, heirou van-na-vanna-ah-kamou ki atta jau-an nda, vanna-vanna-ah koh ymoumi-æn tou keirang-en timang ka pa-amt-en-nau ta atta.

Ni-matte-vlli ta ti Jesus k'ma neini-æn, Talig-au-ppa-mau-kamou ki sasat ki sou, heirou van-na-vanna-ah-kamou ki atta jau-an nda, vanna-vanna-ah koh ymoumi-æn tou keirang-en timang ka pa-amt-en-nau ta atta.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus antwoordende sepde tot haer Ick sal u oock cen woordt braghen t welck indien ghy my sult. seggen so sal ick u oock segghen door wat macht ick dese dingen doe.
And Jesus answered and said unto them, I also will ask you one thing, which if ye tell me, I in like wise will tell you by what authority I do these things.
耶穌回答說：「我也要問你們一句話，你們若告訴我，我就告訴你們我仗着甚麼權柄做這些事。

S.FORM: Nda na ææuloug ti Joan-nes makka-kounna k'anna?Makka Tounnoun kaua?Makka næi kaua? Nda ni-pa-dmir pæh-alalei pa-raryh, Heirou Makka Tounmoun kma ta sou-jan, matte ï-kma-ah-hynna ymian-æn, Ka'umang ka assi-kamou ni-tna-msing tyni-æn?

Nda na ææuloug ti Joan-nes makka-kounna k'anna?Makka Tounnoun kaua?Makka næi kaua? Nda ni-pa-dmir pæh-alalei pa-raryh, Heirou Makka Tounmoun kma ta sou-jan, matte ï-kma-ah-hynna ymian-æn, Ka'umang ka assi-kamou ni-tna-msing tyni-æn?
S.TRANSL: De Boop Joannis ban waer was{[die?}Upt den Hemel ofte uyt de menschen? Ei spoberlepden by hae? selben ende sepden Fndien wy seggen Uyt den Hemel so sal Hp ons feggen Waerom en hebt gp hem di niet geloofts
The baptism of John, whence was it? from heaven, or of men? And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say unto us, Why did ye not then believe him?
約翰的洗禮是從哪裏來的？是從天上來的？是從人間來的呢？」他們彼此商議說：「我們若說『從天上來』，他必對我們說：『這樣，你們為甚麼不信他呢？』

S.FORM: Irou rå Makka ka'æuloung koun-nian, Anna ta kahtakout-ni-an ta makoilalaulau: alei ka Ta-ma-matta i-tan-da ymmid ni-koua nein ti Joannes-an.
Irou rå Makka ka'æuloung koun-nian, Anna ta kahtakout-ni-an ta makoilalaulau: alei ka Ta-ma-matta i-tan-da ymmid ni-koua nein ti Joannes-an.
S.TRANSL: Endemdien wp seggen Upt den menschen lao breefen wp de schare; want fp houden alle Joannem boor een Propheet. |
But if we shall say, Of men; we fear the people; for all hold John as a prophet.
若說『從人間來』，我們又怕百姓，因為他們都以約翰為先知。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattai-v'lli ta neni k'ma ti Jesus-an, Akierei.Ni-k'ma-appa ta teni neini-æn, K'assi koh vanna-vanna-ah ymoumi-æn, tou kailh-gen ti mang ka pam'ten-au ta atta.
Ni-mattai-v'lli ta neni k'ma ti Jesus-an, Akierei.Ni-k'ma-appa ta teni neini-æn, K'assi koh vanna-vanna-ah ymoumi-æn, tou kailh-gen ti mang ka pam'ten-au ta atta.
S.TRANSL: Ende sy Jesus antwoordende feyden \Yp en weten t niet. Ende hy sepde tot haer Soo en seggheick u oock niet door wat macht ick ditdr..
And they answered Jesus, and said, We cannot tell. And he said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.
於是回答耶穌說：「我們不知道。」耶穌說：「我也不告訴你們我仗着甚麼權柄做這些事。」

S.FORM: Ka pah-mang-noumi pah-dimdim? Saat ki voual ka akou-alak ki darouha, ka rou ou-koua-an tyn ki naunamqu,ni-k'ma, Alak ou-koua-au, mei-ryng-ei-â hnyn ki wa'i katta tou atto-kakaræuma-tag-hen-au.
Ka pah-mang-noumi pah-dimdim? Saat ki voual ka akou-alak ki darouha, ka rou ou-koua-an tyn ki naunamqu,ni-k'ma, Alak ou-koua-au, mei-ryng-ei-â hnyn ki wa'i katta tou atto-kakaræuma-tag-hen-au.
S.TRANSL: Maer wat duncktu? Een mensche hadde twee so'nen ende gaende tot den eessten sepde Sone gaet henmen werckt heden in mijnen wijngaert.
But what think ye? A certain man had two sons; and he came to the first, and said, Son, go work to day in my vineyard.
又說：「一個人有兩個兒子。他來對大兒子說：『我兒，你今天到葡萄園裏去做工。』

S.FORM: Rå ni-patta'i-vlli-en tyn k'ma, Ynnang-koh : si-äugh ki atta dou mavoulas, ni-mou-koua-ato-ra.
Rå ni-patta'i-vlli-en tyn k'ma, Ynnang-koh : si-äugh ki atta dou mavoulas, ni-mou-koua-ato-ra.
S.TRANSL: Doch hy antwoordde ende sepde Ick en wil niet : ende daer nae berouw hebbende gingh hy henen.
He answered and said, I will not: but afterward he repented, and went.
他回答說：『我不去』，以後自己懊悔，就去了。

S.FORM: Irou ka qu-koun tyn ki kararouha, ni-pa'myh-kaulaula ki sou tyni-æn. Ka rou pattæ'i-v'lli-en tyn ni-k'ma, Nda mou-koua-ah koh, rå assityn vuttin mou-koua.
Irou ka qu-koun tyn ki kararouha, ni-pa'myh-kaulaula ki sou tyni-æn. Ka rou pattæ'i-v'lli-en tyn ni-k'ma, Nda mou-koua-ah koh, rå assityn vuttin mou-koua.
S.TRANSL: Ende gaende tot den tweeden seyde desghelijcks. Ende dese antwoordde ende sepde Ick [gae] Heere ende hy en gingh niet.
And he came to the second, and said likewise. And he answered and said, I go, sir: and went not.
又來對小兒子也是這樣說。他回答說：『父啊，我去』，他卻不去。

S.FORM: Timang ki darouha k'atta ta ni-pamut ki ka-moei-in ki Ra-ma? Ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn, Ti Naunamou. Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Missing koun-nau-ka-mou-râ, ka tama-jmug ki jnejna-appa ka maveioung mou-ouro-ah mou-koua ymoumi-æn tou Pei-sasou-an ki Alid.

Timang ki darouha k'atta ta ni-pamut ki kamoei-in ki Rama? Ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn, Ti Naunamou. Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Missing koun-nau-ka-mou-râ, ka tama-jmug ki jnejna-appa ka maveioung mou-ouro-ah mou-koua ymoumi-æn tou Pei-sasou-an ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Whae ban dese twee heeft den wille des baders gedaens Sy feyden tot hem "De tessite. Jesus leyde tot Haer Doorwaer ick segge u 'daf de tollenaers ende de Hoeren n boorgaen in t koninckrijcke Godts.
Whether of them twain did the will of his father? They say unto him, The first. Jesus saith unto them, Verily I say unto you, That the publicans and the harlots go into the kingdom of God before you.
你們想，這兩個兒子是哪一個遵行父命呢？」他們說：「大兒子。」耶穌說：「我實在告訴你們，稅吏和娼妓倒比你們先進上帝的國。

S.FORM: Ka ni-ierroua ta ti Joannes ymouni-æn tou darang ki katik-tik-an, rå assi-kamou ni-tna-msing tyni-æn: rå ni-tna-msing tyni-æn ta Tama-jmugh ki jnejna-appa ka maveioung. Imoumi-rà dou ni-kytta noumi [ta anna] assi-kamou ni-malikog mavoulas tou äugh alei ki tra-msing-ei-moumi tyni-æn,

Ka ni-ierroua ta ti Joannes ymouni-æn tou darang ki katiktik-an, rå assi-kamou ni-tna-msing tyni-æn: rå ni-tna-msing tyni-æn ta Tama-jmugh ki jnejna-appa ka maveioung. Imoumi-rà dou ni-kytta noumi [ta anna] assi-kamou ni-malikog mavoulas tou äugh alei ki tra-msing-ei-moumi tyni-æn,
S.TRANSL: Want Joannes is tot u gekomen in den wegh der gerechrigheyt ende ghy en hebt hem niet geloofc : maer de tollenaers ende de hoeren hebben hem geloofc: doch ghy [falcks] siende en hebt daer na geen beronw geHadt om hem te gelooben.

For John came unto you in the way of righteousness, and ye believed him not: but the publicans and the harlots believed him: and ye, when ye had seen it, repented not afterward, that ye might believe him.
因為約翰遵着義路到你們這裏來，你們卻不信他；稅吏和娼妓倒信他。你們看見了，後來還是不懊悔去信他。」 （可12‧1－12；路20‧9－19）

S.FORM: Millingig-hå ki pani ki pa-myh-kaulaulan. Ni-akoumea sat ki ta'u ka mei-sasou ki sat katal-laghan, ka ni-talum-en tyn ta atto-kakaræumatæ æn, ka ni-pou-ryt toung-en tyn ta tatavagh; ka ni kou-dauk-en tyn ta dauk ka pa tquan ki ni-siput ka hala ki karau-matah, ka nipei-ryngei tyn ta ta-rakal ka vahto, ka ni-pa-itou-koua hynna ki Tama-tahkoul, ka ni tha-bulappa mou-koua tou pani ki pourough.

Millingig-hå ki pani ki pa-myh-kaulaulan. Ni-akoumea sat ki ta'u ka mei-sasou ki sat katal-laghan, ka ni-talum-en tyn ta atto-kakaræumatæ æn, ka ni-pou-ryt toung-en tyn ta tatavagh; ka ni kou-dauk-en tyn ta dauk ka pa tquan ki ni-siput ka hala ki karau-matah, ka nipei-ryngei tyn ta ta-rakal ka vahto, ka ni-pa-itou-koua hynna ki Tama-tahkoul, ka ni tha-bulappa mou-koua tou pani ki pourough.
S.TRANSL: Doort cen ander gelijckenisse, Daer was een heere des huys die eenen wijngaert plantede ende settede eenen tuyn daer omme ende moef eenen whapers-back daer in ende bouwde eenen tooren ende bethuerde dien den lant lieden ende repsde bupten [landts.]

Hear another parable: There was a certain householder, which planted a vineyard, and hedged it round about, and digged a winepress in it, and built a tower, and let it out to husbandmen, and went into a far country:
「你們再聽一個比喻：有個家主栽了一個葡萄園，周圍圈上籬笆，裏面挖了一個壓酒池，蓋了一座樓，租給園戶，就往外國去了。

S.FORM: Irou ka irou aroua ta kidi ki pakka-voua-an, ni-padingi-en tyn ta kouncia tyn pa-ou-koua ki Tama-tahkoul kanna, ka ara-auh nein ta voua tyn-da.
Irou ka irou aroua ta kidi ki pakka-voua-an, ni-padingi-en tyn ta kouncia tyn pa-ou-koua ki Tama-tahkoul kanna, ka ara-auh nein ta voua tyn-da.
S.TRANSL: Doe nu de tijdt der bucchten genaeckce and hy syne dienfknechten tot de landt-lieden om [ijne bruchten te ontfangen.
And when the time of the fruit drew near, he sent his servants to the husbandmen, that they might receive the fruits of it.
收果子的時候近了，就打發僕人到園戶那裏去收果子。

S.FORM: Irou ka myngid ta Tama-tahkoul ki kouncia tyn, ni-pasing-sangsah-in nein ta saat, ni-lpogh un ta pani [ki voual,] ka ni-cyt nein ki vahto ta ti katatourou.
Irou ka myngid ta Tama-tahkoul ki kouncia tyn, ni-pasing-sangsah-in nein ta saat, ni-lpogh un ta pani [ki voual,] ka ni-cyt nein ki vahto ta ti katatourou.
S.TRANSL: Ende de landtlieden nemende ijne dienftknechtt hebben den eenen geslagen ende den anderen gedoodt ende den derden gelteenight.
And the husbandmen took his servants, and beat one, and killed another, and stoned another.
園戶拿住僕人，打了一個，殺了一個，用石頭打死一個。

S.FORM: Ni-mila madingi ki pani ki kouncia ka masaoun mabatoung ki tou ouro k'anna, ka ni-papah kaulaula ta neni neini-æn-da.
Ni-mila madingi ki pani ki kouncia ka masaoun mabatoung ki tou ouro k'anna, ka ni-papah kaulaula ta neni neini-æn-da.
S.TRANSL: Wederom sandt hy andere dienstknechten meer [in't getal] dan de eesfte ende sp deden hae: desgelijcks.
Again, he sent other servants more than the first: and they did unto them likewise.
主人又打發別的僕人去，比先前更多；園戶還是照樣待他們。

S.FORM: Nda tou äugh ni-padingi-en tyn pa-ou-koua neini-æn ta A-lak tyn [ka paragh] ka kima, Mahtakout-ah lava ki Alak-au-râ.
Nda tou äugh ni-padingi-en tyn pa-ou-koua neini-æn ta Alak tyn [ka paragh] ka kima, Mahtakout-ah lava ki Alak-au-râ.
S.TRANSL: Ei ten laetlten sandt hy cot haer shnen sone seggende Sp sullen mijnen sone ontfien,
But last of all he sent unto them his son, saying, They will reverence my son.
後來打發他的兒子到他們那裏去，意思說：『他們必尊敬我的兒子。』

S.FORM: Irou ka knytta ki Alak [ka parægh] ta Tama-tahkoul, ni-matta i-sal matta i-tavætavah, Teni ta tabli-ah tammia, nda pa-kapatei-eta tyni-æn, tammi-'eta ki-tablien-tyn-da.
Irou ka knytta ki Alak [ka parægh] ta Tama-tahkoul, ni-matta i-sal matta i-tavætavah, Teni ta tabli-ah tammia, nda pa-kapatei-eta tyni-æn, tammi-'eta ki-tablien-tyn-da.
S.TRANSL: Mare? de landt-lieden den sone stende sepden onder malkanderen Dese is de ertgenaem komt laet ons hem dooden ende lijne erffenisse [aen ons] behouden.
But when the husbandmen saw the son, they said among themselves, This is the heir; come, let us kill him, and let us seize on his inheritance.
不料，園戶看見他兒子，就彼此說：『這是承受產業的。來吧，我們殺他，佔他的產業！』

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-ara nein tmou-roung tyni-æn, ni-maryng smaki-tauagh ki atto-kakaraumatæ æn ka ni-pakapatei tyni-æn.
Irou ka ni-ara nein tmou-roung tyni-æn, ni-maryng smaki-tauagh ki atto-kakaraumatæ æn ka ni-pakapatei tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende hem nemende wieypen sy [hem]uyt buyten den wijngaert ende doodden shem. ]
And they caught him, and cast him out of the vineyard, and slew him.
他們就拿住他，推出葡萄園外，殺了。

S.FORM: Irou râ irou-al-ato ta Mei-rang ki atto-kakaræumata-'han, oumang-ah lava ki Tama-tahkoul k'anna?
Irou râ irou-al-ato ta Mei-rang ki atto-kakaræumata-'han, oumang-ah lava ki Tama-tahkoul k'anna?
S.TRANSL: Wanneer dan de Heere des whngaerts komen sal wat sal hy dien landt lieden doen $
When the lord therefore of the vineyard cometh, what will he do unto those husbandmen?
園主來的時候要怎樣處治這些園戶呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Paka-patei-eih tyn ta assi mariang k'anna ki kapatei-an ka mat'e, ka pa-itou koua-ah ki atto-kakaræumatæ-'an ki pani ki voual ka tmahkoul, ka pi-a tyni-æn ki voua tou kidi nein ki tauwil.

Ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Pakapatei-eih tyn ta assi mariang k'anna ki kapatei-an ka mat'e, ka pa-itou koua-ah ki atto-kakaræumatæ-'an ki pani ki voual ka tmahkoul, ka pi-a tyni-æn ki voua tou kidi nein ki tauwil.
S.TRANSL: Sp feyden tot hem Þp sal de quade eent guaden doodt aen doen ende sal den wijngaert anderen landt-lieden berhueren die hem de pruchren op hare tijden sul-
They say unto him, He will miserably destroy those wicked men, and will let out his vineyard unto other husbandmen, which shall render him the fruits in their seasons.
他們說：「要下毒手除滅那些惡人，將葡萄園另租給那按着時候交果子的園戶。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Myhkakoua kaua assi-moumi ni-kuhtung tou na sasoulat, Vahto ka ni-aryng ki Tama-mei-ryngei ki tallagh, ni-kæuh-vahto tou pou-soul: Ni-pamt-in ti JEHOVA ta atta, ka 'ouryng-hau-in-ato tou .matta-eta.

Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Myhkakoua kaua assi-moumi ni-kuhtung tou na sasoulat, Vahto ka ni-aryng ki Tama-mei-ryngei ki tallagh, ni-kæuh-vahto tou pou-soul: Ni-pamt-in ti JEHOVA ta atta, ka 'ouryng-hau-in-ato tou .matta-eta.
S.TRANSL: Jesus sepde tot hae? ebt ghy noyt gelesen in de chiiften De iteen dien de ouw lieden berworpen hebHeere 1s dit gheschiet ende het is wonderlick in onse ooghen. | wm_

Jesus saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner: this is the Lord's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes?
耶穌說：「經上寫着：

S.FORM: Alei ki anna pasousou-en-au-kamou, ka baoumi-'eih ymou mi-æn ta Pei-sasou-an ki Alid, ka pa -koua-eih pa'ä-tounnoun ki ta'u ka makka-vavoua.
Alei ki anna pasousou-en-au-kamou, ka baoumi-'eih ymou mi-æn ta Pei-sasou-an ki Alid, ka pa -koua-eih pa'ä-tounnoun ki ta'u ka makka-vavoua.
S.TRANSL: Dateyom segge ick ntieden dat het honinckrijck Godts ban u [al wech genomen worden MDE eenen
Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of God shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof.
所以我告訴你們，上帝的國必從你們奪去，賜給那能結果子的百姓。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta mou-aryng mou-halap ki vahtou k'anna, pauh-tæuitau-eih ta teni: ka ti mamang ta t'kona-eih ki anna, pa-ka-parouppou-ah tyni-æn.
Ka timamang ta mou-aryng mou-halap ki vahtou k'anna, pauh-tæuitau-eih ta teni: ka ti mamang ta t'kona-eih ki anna, pa-ka-parouppou-ah tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende wie op desen teen balt diesalberplettert worden : ende op wien hy balt balt dien sal Hy bermorseen,
And whosoever shall fall on this stone shall be broken: but on whomsoever it shall fall, it will grind him to powder.
誰掉在這石頭上，必要跌碎；這石頭掉在誰的身上，就要把誰砸得稀爛。」

S.FORM: Irou ka millingigh ta Ta ma-p'hik ka Si-bavau ki Fariféen appa ki pa'myhkaulaula'n tyn katta, ni-ou-mhan nein ka patta i-mymy-antyn neini-æn.
Irou ka millingigh ta Ta ma-p'hik ka Si-bavau ki Fariféen appa ki pa'myhkaulaula'n tyn katta, ni-ou-mhan nein ka patta i-mymy-antyn neini-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende als de Oberpaiefters ende Phariseen dese lijne ghelyckenissen hoorden ber{tonde sy dat hy ban haer rack.
And when the chief priests and Pharisees had heard his parables, they perceived that he spake of them.
祭司長和法利賽人聽見他的比喻，就看出他是指着他們說的。

S.FORM: Ka rou kmiym ki tou roung-en tyni-æn,ni-mahtakout ki makoilalaulau, alei ka Tama-mat-tæ 'itan ta teni ni-k'ma ta rýh nein. Kararouha kytti æn æb ki rouha ki Ibah ki foulat.
Ka rou kmiym ki tou roung-en tyni-æn,ni-mahtakout ki makoilalaulau, alei ka Tama-mat-tæ 'itan ta teni ni-k'ma ta rýh nein. Kararouha kytti æn æb ki rouha ki Ibah ki foulat.
S.TRANSL: Ende soeckende hem te bangen breesden sy de scharen dewijle dese hem hielden boor een Propheet.
But when they sought to lay hands on him, they feared the multitude, because they took him for a prophet.
他們想要捉拿他，只是怕眾人，因為眾人以他為先知。
